channel.description:
Communication channel:
- `email` — Transactional/marketing email
- `sms` — SMS to mobile
- `push` — Mobile push notification
- `document_digital` — PDF via secure online portal
- `document_postal` — Physical postal mail
- `auto` — Smart routing (platform selects optimal channel)
channel.title: Channel

recipient.description:
The message recipient. Provide either `partyId` (known customer) or
`contactDetails` (unknown party) — not both.

oneOf.description: Recipient identified by internal party reference

partyId.description: Internal party identifier. Contact details and preferences are resolved automatically.

oneOf.title: RecipientByPartyId

oneOf.description: Recipient identified by direct contact details (unknown party)

contactDetails.description: Direct contact information for an unknown party

phone.description: Phone number in E.164 format (required for sms/push channels)

contactDetails.title: ContactDetails

oneOf.title: RecipientByContactDetails

recipient.title: Recipient

content.description:
Message content. Provide either `templateId` (recommended) or an inline `body`.
Template variables are substituted using Handlebars syntax.

variables.description: Values to substitute into template variables

subject.description: Email subject line. Overrides the template subject if provided.

body.description: Inline message body (plain text). Used when no template is specified.

url.description: Pre-signed URL to the attachment content (valid for at least 1 hour)

content.title: MessageContent

priority.description:
Delivery priority. `high` priority messages skip standard queuing and are
dispatched immediately (subject to rate limits).

idempotencyKey.description:
Client-supplied key to prevent duplicate sends. If a message with this key
was already accepted within the last 24 hours, the original response is returned
without re-sending.

scheduledAt.description: Schedule the message for future delivery (ISO 8601). Must be in the future.

tags.description: Custom labels for filtering and reporting

correlationId.description: Caller-supplied ID for tracing across systems. Echoed back in all events.

smsUnknownParty.summary: SMS to unknown party (contact details provided)

content.subject: Payment received
content.body: We've received your payment of £250. Thank you!
